Academic Coaching

Personal AI coaching for academics who want to do more

Intensive 1-to-1 and small group coaching that helps academics use AI to accelerate research, improve teaching, reduce admin burden and reclaim time for the work that matters most.

6hrs

Average weekly time saved after 4 coaching sessions

1-to-1

Or small groups of up to 6 - you choose the format

Online

All sessions delivered via MS Teams, no travel required

Why academics benefit from coaching rather than training

Discipline and role-specific coaching enables academics to have their specific needs met in a supportive and non-threatening environment.

Through such a targeted approach, participant's confidence, productivity and innovation all build exponentially.

Our HE specialists work with you to identify the highest-leverage areas where AI can make a real difference - whether that is literature reviewing, grant writing, marking feedback, course design, or academic writing - working through them practically, with your actual work, in real time.

Coaching areas

  • AI for research and literature review
  • Grant and funding application writing
  • Academic writing and publishing
  • Lecture and course design with AI
  • Marking and assessment feedback at scale
  • Administrative task automation
  • Presenting and communicating research

What to expect

  • Free 30-minute discovery call to assess fit
  • Bespoke coaching plan for your priorities
  • Weekly or fortnightly sessions via MS Teams
  • Hands-on work with your real tasks and documents
  • Session notes and action points after every call
  • Email support between sessions included
  • Flexible scheduling around teaching commitments

Formats and packages

Coaching is available as individual sessions, structured packages or ongoing monthly arrangements. Small group coaching (up to 6 academics from the same department or discipline) is available at a reduced per-person rate and is particularly effective for building shared practice across a team.

Many academics begin with a four-session starter package to tackle a specific project - a grant application, a new module, a book chapter - and then continue on a monthly basis for ongoing support.

Individual 1-to-1 sessions 4-session starter package Monthly coaching retainer Small group (up to 6) Department cohort coaching

Start with a free discovery call

Book a no-obligation 30-minute session to discuss your specific needs and whether coaching is the right fit.
